dataset.query: FROM logs-gcp.composer* | WHERE gcp.composer.task_id == "dag_complete" | STATS `Total runs` = COUNT()

FROM logs-gcp.composer* | WHERE gcp.composer.task_id == "dag_complete" | STATS total = COUNT(), failures = SUM(CASE(event.outcome == "failure", 1, 0)) | EVAL `Failure %` = ROUND(failures * 100.0 / total, 1)
FROM logs-gcp.composer* | WHERE gcp.composer.task_id == "dag_complete" AND gcp.composer.duration_ms IS NOT NULL | STATS `Avg duration` = ROUND(AVG(gcp.composer.duration_ms), 0)
FROM logs-gcp.composer* | WHERE gcp.composer.task_id == "dag_complete" AND gcp.composer.quality_check == "DEGRADED" | STATS `Degraded` = COUNT()

config.title: Pipeline events over time by service

dataset.query: FROM logs-gcp.* | WHERE labels.pipeline_run_id IS NOT NULL | EVAL svc = COALESCE(cloud.service.name, "unknown") | STATS count = COUNT() BY svc, bucket = DATE_TRUNC(30 minutes, @timestamp)

FROM logs-gcp.composer* | WHERE gcp.composer.task_id == "dag_complete" | EVAL status = CASE(event.outcome == "failure", "Failed", gcp.composer.quality_check == "DEGRADED", "Degraded", "Success") | STATS count = COUNT() BY status

config.title: Dataproc Spark — records read vs written

dataset.query: FROM logs-gcp.dataproc* | WHERE gcp.dataproc.spark.records_read IS NOT NULL | STATS read = SUM(gcp.dataproc.spark.records_read), written = SUM(gcp.dataproc.spark.records_written) BY bucket = DATE_TRUNC(30 minutes, @timestamp)
FROM logs-gcp.bigquery* | WHERE gcp.bigquery.bytes_processed IS NOT NULL | STATS bytes = SUM(gcp.bigquery.bytes_processed) BY bucket = DATE_TRUNC(30 minutes, @timestamp)
FROM logs-gcp.* | WHERE labels.pipeline_run_id IS NOT NULL AND event.outcome == "failure" | STATS count = COUNT() BY error.type, bucket = DATE_TRUNC(30 minutes, @timestamp)
FROM logs-gcp.gcs* | WHERE labels.pipeline_run_id IS NOT NULL | STATS bytes = SUM(gcp.cloud_storage.bytes_sent) BY gcp.cloud_storage.method_name

FROM logs-gcp.composer* | WHERE gcp.composer.task_id == "dag_complete" | KEEP @timestamp, gcp.composer.dag_id, gcp.composer.state, gcp.composer.duration_ms, gcp.composer.quality_check, gcp.composer.records_processed, cloud.region | SORT @timestamp DESC | LIMIT 20

config.title: Data Catalog — entries updated over time

dataset.query: FROM logs-gcp.data_catalog* | WHERE gcp.data_catalog.tables_updated IS NOT NULL | STATS updated = SUM(gcp.data_catalog.tables_updated) BY bucket = DATE_TRUNC(30 minutes, @timestamp)
